name: safe-agent-cli-mcp
description: Dry-run-first MCP tools for local Claude and Codex CLIs with cwd allowlists and no shell spawning.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @safe-agent-cli-mcp/shared && npm run build -w @safe-agent-cli-mcp/claude-cli-mcp && npm run build -w @safe-agent-cli-mcp/codex-cli-mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @safe-agent-cli-mcp/shared && npm run typecheck -w @safe-agent-cli-mcp/claude-cli-mcp && npm run typecheck -w @safe-agent-cli-mcp/codex-cli-mcp
